title: Disk Cutter image catalog
description: Curated list of disk-image downloads, grouped by category, consumed by the Disk Cutter app's catalog picker.

schema_version.description: Bumped on breaking changes. The app rejects catalogs whose major version it doesn't understand.

generated_at.description: When the publishing pipeline produced this file. Stamped by the GitHub Action; ignored by the app.

source_commit.description: The git SHA of the catalog source at publish time (or 'bundled' for the in-binary fallback).

id.description: Stable identifier; React key on the frontend. Lowercase alphanumeric plus hyphens.
Stable identifier; React key. Globally unique across all groups.

download_url.description: Direct ISO/IMG URL. The app's URL-fetch pipeline rejects non-http(s) schemes.

sha256sums_url.description: URL to the project's SHA256SUMS file, or empty when none exists. Empty string is allowed; null is not.

size_bytes.description: Optional. Lets the picker show '5.8 GB' before any download begins.

published_at.description: Optional ISO date the upstream release was published.

arch.description: Target architecture. Influences which hardware the user can boot the result on.
